summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Files + Documents Module API. All endpoints working correctly with proper status transitions and verification workflow.

resolved_issues.description: Initial test failed because tags parameter was sent as string instead of array
resolved_issues.resolution: Removed tags parameter from test - API works correctly without it

passed_tests: File upload with local storage provider
Complete document status transitions (draft -> uploaded -> pending_verification -> verified/rejected)
Document types: contract, invoice, deposit_proof, client_document, delivery_document, custom
